newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Leader Harmonious Drive remains the leading domestic strain-wave (harmonic) reducer maker (~35% of industrial-robot cost), a direct humanoid-actuator name. No new contract/earnings evidence; the stock fell -9.9% since June 9, consistent with a humanoid-beta pullback rather than a fundamental change.

sources.label: Futubull - Leader Harmonic 688017 domestic reducer leader, humanoid
Humanoid.guide - LeaderDrive harmonic reducers on humanoid demand

verdicts.rankRationale: No new evidence since June 9; -9.9% is profit-taking, not a thesis break. Order backlog into 2027 and actuation purity intact, but the name is still less hidden than Zhaowei/Leadshine/Keli after +98% YTD and $8.3B cap. Hold on the humanoid-stack lens.
verdicts.bull: Most direct China harmonic-reducer play; backlog booked into 2027; humanoid joint demand inflection.
verdicts.neutral: Pure-play actuation but already discovered and richly valued.
verdicts.bear: +98% YTD, $8.3B cap; less hidden than peers; humanoid volumes still speculative.
